title: COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION - 211info
text: YAMHILL COMMUNITY CARE COORDINATED CARE ORGANIZATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Yamhill Community Care is a Coordinated Care Organization (CCO) that coordinates health care services for Medicaid members assigned to its CCO. Provides specialized information and referrals to health care providers, including physicians and specialists, for services such as dental care, eye care, pharmacies, substance use disorder treatment, and transportation for health care visits covered by the Oregon Health Plan (OHP). Eligibility: Medicaid/Oregon Health Plan (OHP) members enrolled in Yamhill Community Care Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (855) 722-8205 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (855) 722-8205 TTY/TTD 711 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Yamhill County; zip codes 97101, 97119, 97123, 97132, 97137, 97140, 97304, 97347, 97378, and 97396 (Polk and Washington County only) SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm, closed government holidays Services: Eye Care Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Pain Management * Medicaid Recipients Pharmacy Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Physician Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Specialized Information and Referral * Medicaid Recipients Substance Use Disorder Referrals * Medicaid Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: EDUCATIONAL INSTITUTIONS/SCHOOLS - YAMHILL EARLY LEARNING HUB EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - PRESCHOOL PROMISE FOOD - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS NUTRITION SUPPORTS HOUSING/SHELTER - FLEXIBLE SERVICES HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS HOME MODIFICATION HOUSING/SHELTER - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS HOUSING SUPPORTS RENTAL ASSISTANCE MATERIAL GOODS - HEALTH RELATED SOCIAL NEEDS CLIMATE SUPPORTS TRANSPORTATION - WELLRIDE If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
